title: Measure What Matters
subtitle: How Google, Bono, and the Gates Foundation Rock the World with OKRs
author: John Doerr
themes: The four superpowers of OKRs: Focus, Align, Track, Stretch
CFRs as the cultural complement to OKRs
Andy Grove's Intel origin story of OKRs
Transparency and cascading goals across organizations
awards: One of Bloomberg's Best Books of 2018
One of Business Insider's Best Business Books of 2018
excerpt: Ideas are easy. Execution is everything. Measure What Matters is the definitive playbook for setting audacious goals and delivering on them — the system that powered Google from a 40-person startup to a trillion-dollar company.
